# AUTO-GENERATED by split_acceptance_tests.py
# Each original test function was split into one function per top-level
# assertion so pytest reports per-check pass/fail counts.
import re

def test_groupsearchview_create_or_update_uses_correct_organization_kwarg_and_position_arg__a1():
    source = open('/workspace/src/sentry/api/endpoints/organization_pinned_searches.py', 'r').read()
    assert 'GroupSearchView.objects.create_or_update' in source, 'Expected OrganizationPinnedSearchEndpoint.put to call GroupSearchView.objects.create_or_update'

def test_groupsearchview_create_or_update_uses_correct_organization_kwarg_and_position_arg__a2():
    source = open('/workspace/src/sentry/api/endpoints/organization_pinned_searches.py', 'r').read()
    assert 'organizaiton=' not in source, "GroupSearchView.objects.create_or_update must not use the misspelled kwarg 'organizaiton='; it should be 'organization='"

def test_groupsearchview_create_or_update_uses_correct_organization_kwarg_and_position_arg__a3():
    source = open('/workspace/src/sentry/api/endpoints/organization_pinned_searches.py', 'r').read()
    assert 'organization=organization' in source, 'Expected GroupSearchView.objects.create_or_update to be called with organization=organization'

def test_groupsearchview_create_or_update_uses_correct_organization_kwarg_and_position_arg__a4():
    source = open('/workspace/src/sentry/api/endpoints/organization_pinned_searches.py', 'r').read()
    assert re.search('GroupSearchView\\.objects\\.create_or_update\\([\\s\\S]*\\bposition\\s*=\\s*0\\b', source), 'Expected GroupSearchView.objects.create_or_update to pass position=0 as a top-level argument'

def test_groupsearchview_create_or_update_uses_correct_organization_kwarg_and_position_arg__a5():
    source = open('/workspace/src/sentry/api/endpoints/organization_pinned_searches.py', 'r').read()
    assert '"position"' not in source and "'position'" not in source, "Expected 'position' to not be included in the values dict; it should be passed as position=0 argument"

results.test_code:
# AUTO-GENERATED by split_acceptance_tests.py
# Each original test function was split into one function per top-level
# assertion so pytest reports per-check pass/fail counts.
import re

def test_groupsearchview_create_or_update_includes_position_in_select_criteria__a1():
    source = open('/workspace/src/sentry/api/endpoints/organization_pinned_searches.py', 'r', encoding='utf-8').read()
    m = re.search('GroupSearchView\\.objects\\.create_or_update\\(\\s*(?P<args>.*?)\\)\\s*', source, flags=re.DOTALL)
    assert m, 'Expected a GroupSearchView.objects.create_or_update(...) call in the endpoint.'

def test_groupsearchview_create_or_update_includes_position_in_select_criteria__a2():
    source = open('/workspace/src/sentry/api/endpoints/organization_pinned_searches.py', 'r', encoding='utf-8').read()
    m = re.search('GroupSearchView\\.objects\\.create_or_update\\(\\s*(?P<args>.*?)\\)\\s*', source, flags=re.DOTALL)
    args = m.group('args')
    assert re.search('^\\s*position\\s*=\\s*0\\s*,', args, flags=re.MULTILINE), 'Expected GroupSearchView.objects.create_or_update(...) to include `position=0` as a top-level select criterion (unique is org, user, position).'

def test_groupsearchview_create_or_update_includes_position_in_select_criteria__a3():
    source = open('/workspace/src/sentry/api/endpoints/organization_pinned_searches.py', 'r', encoding='utf-8').read()
    m = re.search('GroupSearchView\\.objects\\.create_or_update\\(\\s*(?P<args>.*?)\\)\\s*', source, flags=re.DOTALL)
    args = m.group('args')
    assert not re.search('values\\s*=\\s*\\{[^}]*"position"\\s*:', args, flags=re.DOTALL), 'Did not expect `position` to be inside the `values={...}` dict; it should be part of the select criteria passed directly to create_or_update(...).'
